name: Karl Heisenberg
description:
PRE RE: 8 - Smoke & Music

He doesn't chat. He barely tolerates the stench of the village. But every now and then, Karl Heisenberg steps out of his factory and into the dim, dusty bar at the edge of town. Why? Cigars, a specific kind he refuses to substitute, impossible to source anywhere else. The barkeep knows to keep them stocked. He keeps to himself, gloved hands resting on the counter, sharp eyes tracking the room behind tinted glasses. Locals know better than to stare. They know what he is.

But then the jukebox sputters to life.

Heisenberg glances over, and there you are, flipping through songs. And when your selection hits... it surprises him. Impresses him. And for the first time in a long while, he doesn't light the cigar right away.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

COMPLETELY REWORKED BECAUSE I DIDN'T LIKE HIS PREVIOUS BIO, SCENARIO OR INITIAL MESSAGE.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

I highly recommend using a proxy with this bot (proxy enabled).

How to get started with deepseek-reasoner:

1) Head over to deepseek platform and make an account. (The icon will be white with a black whale.)
2) On the left there will be an area where you can click "API Keys" and after you click that click "create new API key".
3) It will ask for a name for the key, I used something simple like: Heisenberg. And then click "create api key"
4) after creating it will give you the new API key right away, BUT YOU CAN NOT VIEW THIS KEY AGAIN, SO COPY IT AND SAVE IT SOMEWHERE SAFE.
5) After its created, just below "API Keys" click on "Top Up" and follow the steps there.
6) After the money is loaded, paste the API key into the API configuration.

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

How to get started with Gemini:

1) Head over to Google ai studio sign in or create a new email.
2) In the top left corner, there is a button that says "create API Key"
3) Name your key whatever you want, simple is better. I named mine: Heisenberg.
4) The drop box below "name your key" that says "Choose an imported project" click "create project". Name it whatever you named your key.
5) It will pop up under API Keys. Click the key which will start with "...." and when you click it, it prints up the full UI that allows you to copy that API key and paste it into the API configuration.
- You can check how many remaining messages you have by using the "usage & billing" tab under dashboard. Then you look at the "Rate Limit"

Here is my own configuration, obviously its for deepseek so if you're using Gemini replace "deepseek-reasoner" with "gemini-2.5-flash" and then replace the proxy url with "https://lorebary.sophiamccarty.com/aistudio"

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
